nasb.text: the third was Absalom the son of Maacah, the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur; the fourth was Adonijah the son of Haggith;

esv.text: the third, Absalom, whose mother was Maacah, the daughter of Talmai, king of Geshur; the fourth, Adonijah, whose mother was Haggith;

cnv.text: 三子押沙龍，是基述王達買的女兒瑪迦生的；四子亞多尼雅，是哈及的兒子；

ccb.text: 三子押沙龙，由基述王达买的女儿玛迦所生；四子亚多尼雅，由哈及所生；
